OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

CYBELANGEL_CLIENT_ID.description: The OAuth2 client ID for the CybelAngel platform API.

CYBELANGEL_CLIENT_SECRET.description: The OAuth2 client secret for the CybelAngel platform API.

CYBELANGEL_API_URL.description: The base URL of the CybelAngel platform API.

CYBELANGEL_AUTH_URL.description: The OAuth2 token endpoint URL for CybelAngel authentication.

CYBELANGEL_AUDIENCE.description: The OAuth2 audience parameter. Defaults to the API URL with a trailing slash if not set.

CYBELANGEL_MARKING.description: The default TLP marking to apply to imported objects.

CYBELANGEL_FETCH_PERIOD.description: Number of days to look back on the first run. Use 0 to fetch all available data.
